tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I changed the [ch]Bm[/ch] to a [ch]Bm7[/ch]. Once you hear it you'll know it is right ;)

Repeat throughout the song:
[ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'm feeling like a star, you can't stop my shine[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I'm lovin' cloud nine, my head's in the sky[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'm solo, I'm ridin' solo[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I'm ridin' solo, I'm ridin solo, solo[/tab]
